note: BPP-A: deterministic JS<->Rust BP+ differential corpus. Each case is driven through dapp/bulletproofs-plus.js (JS attester, tests/bulletproofs-plus-rust-differential.test.mjs) AND cxfer-core verify_range (Rust on-chain authority, range_matches_js_across_random_corpus); both MUST agree with `accept`.
